title: proposal: refactor loading storage options

comments.body:
A lot has happened here recently, in #680. Is this still worth tracking?

Cc: @Luap99

Right I say https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/680 fixed this, if you folks still see opportunity to improve things further please file a new issue/PR.

And sorry for never responding on the issue before, I guess nobody wanted to think to much about storage.conf parsing before.
